name: libstring-escape-perl
title: libstring-escape-perl
description:
module for manipulating escaped strings
String::Escape is a Perl module that provides a flexible calling interface to
some useful string conversion functions, including applying and expanding the
standard C/Unix-style backslash escapes like \n and \t, wrapping and removing
double quotes, and truncating to fit within a desired length.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libstring-escape-perl because module for manipulating escaped strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libstring-escape-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libstring-escape-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libstring-escape-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
